description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 26, 2025 at 3:03 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on La Brea Avenue near Obama Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound in the leftmost lane on La Brea Avenue. A passenger car traveling southbound in the second 
from the leftmost lane on La Brea Avenue, to the right of and behind the Waymo AV, entered the Waymo AV’s lane and the front left side 
of the passenger car made contact with the rear right side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
